query: UPDATE atolls SET slug = LOWER(CONCAT(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(name, 'Atoll', ''), ' ', '-'), 'ü', 'u'), 'ā', 'a'), 'ī', 'i'), 'ō', 'o'), '-atoll')) WHERE slug IS NOT NULL;
